title: KandyToys 3 Piece Plastic Tractor and Trailer Farm Vehicle Toy Play Set | Kids Toys
features: Get your KandyToys 3 piece tractor and trailers farm vehicles play set!
Perfect present for any child who loves outdoors and farm yard toys creating imaginations and hand-eye co-ordination for little ones to play for hours on end!
Set contains 3 x plastic farm vehicles, complete with 3 different trailer attachments.
Great to add into any farm toy set!
Size of pieces range from 5-10cm. Not suitable for under 3 years.
description: From the brand Previous page Here at KandyToys we have a huge range of toys brought to you with over 40 years of experience. We're home to a number of household brands including M.Y and NALU, and based down in Devon! We've got everything from unicorns and dinosaurs to paddle boards and rollerskates. Whether it's traditional games and fun indoors or adventures outside, we've got something for everyone!
